title: draba stylosa
intro: Draba stylosa is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Draba stylosa include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Draba stylosa are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
